## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on increasing conversions by refreshing existing content, improving CTA placement, and creating conversion magnet artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Shift strategy towards creating high-quality, utility-focused content for both human readers and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Experiment with industry-specific content and downloadable resources (e.g., templates, checklists) to improve engagement](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Utilize RB2B data to better understand and target ICPs visiting the blog](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Current performance shows high impressions but low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Most impressions come from 50+ search positions, indicating a need to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Shift focus to creating high-quality, utility-focused content for both human readers and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Experiment with refreshing existing content, moving CTAs higher, and rewording them](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Consider creating a resource destination hub to bypass discovery engines](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Previous white paper approach didn't perform well (3 leads in 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Shift to creating practical, downloadable resources (templates, checklists) instead of academic-style white papers](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Focus on providing comprehensive guides that users can download and white-label](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Experiment with industry-specific content and resources](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### AI and Search Landscape

  - [Discuss challenges of ranking in the AI era and strategies to adapt](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that serves both human and LLM audiences](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Utilize LLM monitoring to track query performance and improve content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### ICP Targeting and Data Analysis

  - [Use RB2B data to identify patterns in website visitors and blog readers](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Consider creating industry-specific content and resources based on visitor data](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of tailoring content for specific industries (e.g., Spanish content for construction and transportation)](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Content Ideas and Experiments

  - [Create downloadable PDF checklists from existing top-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Focus on employee survey content as a high-potential topic](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Experiment with SMS communication for targeting ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell to update and share the strategic plan incorporating discussion points](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Jessica to share raw data from RB2B for GrowthX team to analyze](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [GrowthX to share Atlas platform artifacts for review](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Begin refreshing top-performing content with improved CTAs and downloadable resources](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Explore creation of industry-specific content and templates](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide Atlas platform access to Yourco team (timeline TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/2dFTE5VxdGnnwYcw4BJcQ43LmzajBM4A?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
